English:
DI——DI——DI——————————————————————————————

“We’re very sorry. We did everything we could to save the child, but it was beyond our control.”
Chinese:
滴——滴——滴————————————————————————————

医生：“非常抱歉。我们尽了一切努力去抢救孩子，但心梗来得突然又凶猛，我们无力回天。”

English:
King of Birds! King of Birds!


Our great King of Birds!
Chinese:
鸟王！鸟王！

我们伟大的鸟王！

English:
My child! 
My child!


Oh my God! 
My poor child!
Chinese:
我的孩子！

我的孩子！

我的天哪！

我可怜的孩子！

English:
Hello everyone, I’m the boss of “The Mountains Are Calling,” an online gambling game.

Recently, we learned that a young player passed away while playing our game. We are deeply saddened by this news. From their behavior in the game, it’s clear that they were a kind, responsible, and caring young person.

While there’s no evidence that our game directly caused this tragedy, we want to honor the player and support their family. Our company has decided to donate £10,000 in hopes of helping them through this difficult time.

— PR Department, The Mountains Are Calling
Chinese:
大家好，我是线上博彩游戏“群山在召唤”（The Mountains Are Calling）的负责人。

近日，我们得知一位年轻玩家在玩我们的游戏时不幸去世，对此我们深感悲痛。从他在游戏中的表现来看，他是一位善良、负责、有爱心的年轻人。

虽然没有证据表明我们的游戏直接导致了这场悲剧，但我们仍想缅怀这位玩家，并尽力帮助他的家人。公司决定捐赠1万英镑，希望能帮助他们度过这段艰难的时期。

—— “群山在召唤”公关部

English: "So, what is the destination of the migration?"
Chinese: 那么，这次迁徙的目的地，究竟是哪里呢？
